parents.subject: LU-19443 utils: show help for invalid interactive commands

commit.subject: LU-12738  test: improve write-append-truncate
commit.message:
LU-12738  test: improve write-append-truncate

Let's enlarge the truncate region, so that truncate could occur before
and after the append region.

Add an option to recreate the file write-append-truncate is working on
Useful, when testing layout instatiation, as once instatiated on the
very first loop we cannot de-instantiate it anymore.

Also, fix errno printout for no-error cases.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-13005
Test-Parameters: trivial env=ONLY=write_append_truncate testlist=parallel-scale
Signed-off-by: Vitaly Fertman <vitaly.fertman@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ib7dd1c3bb5ff97c670291df5487baa5d59f4a15e
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61687
Reviewed-by: Alexey Lyashkov <alexey.lyashkov@hpe.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andriy Skulysh <andriy.skulysh@hpe.com>
